theme_and_archetype.description: Premium & elegant, cinematic mood, expensive feel. Utilizes dark backgrounds (midnight or obsidian) with metallic gold accents for trust and high-end positioning.

copywriting.main_headline: Bangun Rumah Impian Anda, Tanpa Drama.
copywriting.sub_headline: Tinggalkan kekhawatiran salah desain, over-budget, dan kontraktor nakal. Kami menjamin ketepatan waktu, transparansi anggaran, dan hasil sempurna.
copywriting.trust_elements: Dipercaya 100+ keluarga di Indonesia • Garansi Konstruksi 1 Tahun

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-bold tracking-tight text-balance leading-tight

surface_strategies.buttons: bg-primary_accent text-black hover:bg-primary_accent_hover transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)]

hero_background.alt: Modern luxury dark architectural home exterior at dusk
hero_background.instructions: Use as full-viewport background with absolute positioning. Apply a gradient overlay `bg-gradient-to-r from-background_base/95 via-background_base/80 to-transparent` to ensure the left-aligned text has high contrast while the right side of the image is clearly visible.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: CTAs must brighten and increase shadow spread. Links must have subtle opacity shifts.
interactions_and_motion.entrance_animations: Staggered fade-up for headline, sub-headline, supporting points, and CTA (using Framer Motion).
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-cta'). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the hero layout to allow full creative control and asynchronous overlapping.
Install and use 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts.
Implement the background image using next/image or standard img tag with `object-cover` and `h-screen`, overlaying the gradient via an absolute div.
Place the supporting points (3 bullet points) in a horizontal or vertical bento-style glassmorphism card or list below the CTA.
For the trust elements, add a small subtle bar at the bottom of the hero or right above the CTA with small icons (e.g., Lucide React 'ShieldCheck' or 'Star').
Do NOT use center-alignment for the main text. Left-align the text in the 7-column grid space.
Do NOT use Inter or standard fonts. Stick strictly to the typography rules.
Install lucide-react if not present for the icons (WhatsApp icon on CTA, CheckCircle for bullets).
